001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.configuration;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository.UserProfileRepository;
004import java.util.List;
005import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
006import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
007import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;
008import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;
009import org.springframework.context.annotation.Profile;
010import org.springframework.core.convert.converter.Converter;
011import org.springframework.security.authentication.AbstractAuthenticationToken;
012import org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.builders.HttpSecurity;
013import org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.configuration.EnableWebSecurity;
014import org.springframework.security.config.http.SessionCreationPolicy;
015import org.springframework.security.oauth2.core.DelegatingOAuth2TokenValidator;
016import org.springframework.security.oauth2.core.OAuth2TokenValidator;
017import org.springframework.security.oauth2.jwt.Jwt;
018import org.springframework.security.oauth2.jwt.JwtClaimNames;
019import org.springframework.security.oauth2.jwt.JwtClaimValidator;
020import org.springframework.security.oauth2.jwt.JwtDecoder;
021import org.springframework.security.oauth2.jwt.JwtDecoders;
022import org.springframework.security.oauth2.jwt.JwtValidators;
023import org.springframework.security.oauth2.jwt.NimbusJwtDecoder;
024import org.springframework.security.oauth2.server.resource.web.authentication.BearerTokenAuthenticationFilter;
025import org.springframework.security.web.SecurityFilterChain;
026
027/**
028 * Spring Security configuration for the {@code service} profile.
029 *
030 * <p>Configures JWT-based authentication/authorization, including an audience/issuer validator and a
031 * filter enforcing {@code userEnabled} for authenticated users.</p>
032 */
033@Configuration
034@EnableWebSecurity
035@Profile("service")
036public class SecurityConfiguration {
037
038  private final Converter<Jwt, ? extends AbstractAuthenticationToken> converter;
039  private final String issuerUri;
040  private final String clientId;
041  private final UserProfileRepository userProfileRepository;
042
043  @Autowired
044  SecurityConfiguration(
045      Converter<Jwt, ? extends AbstractAuthenticationToken> converter,
046      @Value("${spring.security.oauth2.resourceserver.jwt.issuer-uri}") String issuerUri,
047      @Value("${spring.security.oauth2.resourceserver.jwt.client-id}") String clientId,
048      UserProfileRepository userProfileRepository
049  ) {
050    this.converter = converter;
051    this.issuerUri = issuerUri;
052    this.clientId = clientId;
053    this.userProfileRepository = userProfileRepository;
054  }
055
056  /**
057   * Configures the {@link SecurityFilterChain} used by the server.
058   *
059   * @param httpsecurity HTTP security builder.
060   * @return configured filter chain.
061   * @throws Exception if Spring Security fails to build the chain.
062   */
063  @Bean
064  public SecurityFilterChain provideSecurityFilterChain(HttpSecurity httpsecurity) {
065    return httpsecurity
066        .sessionManagement((configurer) ->
067            configurer.sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS))
068        .authorizeHttpRequests((auth) -> auth
069            .requestMatchers("/manager/**").hasRole("MANAGER")
070            .anyRequest().authenticated())
071        .oauth2ResourceServer((customizer) ->
072            customizer.jwt((jwt) -> jwt.jwtAuthenticationConverter(converter)))
073        .addFilterAfter(new UserEnabledFilter(userProfileRepository), BearerTokenAuthenticationFilter.class)
074        .build();
075  }
076
077  /**
078   * Provides a {@link JwtDecoder} configured with audience and issuer validation.
079   *
080   * @return configured decoder.
081   */
082  @Bean
083  public JwtDecoder provideDecoder() {
084    NimbusJwtDecoder decoder = JwtDecoders.fromOidcIssuerLocation(issuerUri);
085    OAuth2TokenValidator<Jwt> audienceValidator =
086        new JwtClaimValidator<List<String>>(JwtClaimNames.AUD, (aud) -> aud.contains(clientId));
087    OAuth2TokenValidator<Jwt> issuerValidator =
088        JwtValidators.createDefaultWithIssuer(issuerUri);
089    OAuth2TokenValidator<Jwt> combinedValidator =
090        new DelegatingOAuth2TokenValidator<>(audienceValidator, issuerValidator);
091    decoder.setJwtValidator(combinedValidator);
092    return decoder;
093  }
094}
